---
id: enable-mfa
title: "Enable TOTP"
description: "Enables TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Invalidates all previous sessions upon success."
sidebar_label: "Enable TOTP"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enable TOTP"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/user/mfa/totp"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enables TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Invalidates all previous sessions upon success.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
